recommendation: STRUCTURAL ARTIFACT — 12-month DR is near-zero. The simulator's writeoff mechanism requires 12 missed installments to trigger coll_status=8, so a 12-month loan can only become a writeoff AT or AFTER its terminal month — outside the offsets-12-23 default_flag_12m window. RECOMMENDATION: **B. EXCLUDE 12-month loans from the economics population**, with caveat that thesis limitations section should document this simulator artifact.
